summary: Tested Buyback Rates feature for AJPL Calculator. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Buyback Rates tab in Rate Management page works correctly with all purities and Save button. Buyback rates display (data-testid='buyback-rates-display') shows correctly on Admin Dashboard, Manager Dashboard, and Sales Exec Dashboard - displaying only purities with rate_per_10g > 0 (24KT ₹58,000, 22KT ₹52,000, 18KT ₹43,000).
passed_tests: GET /api/rates/buyback - returns buyback rate card with all purities
GET /api/rates - returns all 3 rate types (normal, ajpl, buyback)
PUT /api/rates/buyback - admin can update buyback rates
GET /api/rates/buyback - exec users can read buyback rates
Buyback rate card has same purities as normal rate card
Buyback rate card has updated_at and updated_by fields after update
Adding a new purity adds it to buyback rate card
Frontend: RateManagement page has 'Buyback Rates' tab alongside Normal and AJPL
Frontend: Buyback tab shows rate inputs for all purities (24KT, 22KT, 20KT, 18KT, 14KT)
Frontend: Buyback tab has Save Rates button (data-testid='save-buyback-rates')
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows buyback rates display (data-testid='buyback-rates-display')
Frontend: Manager Dashboard shows buyback rates display above bills tabs
Frontend: Sales Exec Dashboard shows buyback rates display above New Bill section
seed_data_creation: Buyback rates set via API: 24KT=58000, 22KT=52000, 18KT=43000. Other purities (20KT, 14KT) are 0.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Buyback Rates feature fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/rates/buyback (returns buyback rate card), PUT /api/rates/buyback (admin-only, updates buyback rates). Buyback rate card is auto-created on startup with all purities from the purities collection. Adding/deleting purities also updates the buyback rate card. Frontend displays buyback rates on all 3 dashboards using data-testid='buyback-rates-display' - only shows purities with rate_per_10g > 0. Rate Management page has 3 tabs: Normal Rates, AJPL Rates, Buyback Rates. OTP delivery is MOCKED - visible via GET /api/admin/pending-otps.

endpoints_tested.notes: Returns buyback rate card with all purities
Returns all 3 rate types including buyback
Adding purity also adds to buyback rate card

security_tested: All authenticated users can read buyback rates via GET /api/rates/buyback

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes visible via GET /api/admin/pending-otps instead of actual SMS delivery
